findings.problem: The chapter explicitly tells Draco and the reader that the Manor cannot fabricate connection and only amplifies existing resonance, then has Draco restate that distinction in his own interiority. The provided context pack and continuity sheet reserve that exculpatory clarification for a later Narcissa-led reframe, so spending it here weakens the rupture's operative uncertainty and steals weight from a later payoff.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the folio read and its downstream interpretation at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:35; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:37; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:41; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:115; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:197; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:287 so Draco learns enough to know Hermione hid contamination risk, but not enough to settle whether the house can originate feeling. Viable fixes include a damaged or incomplete activation clause, a gloss he cannot fully trust, or a partial misread that leaves the decisive rule unavailable in this chapter.
findings.acceptance_test: In the revised material anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:37 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:287, a cold reader cannot state as fact that the Manor only amplifies genuine feeling and cannot fabricate it. Draco's confrontation at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:115 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:197 still reads as a fight about information asymmetry under genuine uncertainty, and chapter 18 can still plausibly deliver the first decisive clarification.

findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly places the rupture in January, but the continuity sheet places the break roughly five and a half weeks after Hermione's early-November arrival and the provided chapter-17 boundary excerpt, set three days later, looks out on a December street. As written, the month markers create a direct timeline contradiction.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the temporal wording at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:149; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:199; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:283; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:329 so the scene reads as deep winter without naming the wrong month, or else realign every local time cue in those lines to preserve continuity with the cycle timeline and the next-chapter boundary.
findings.acceptance_test: After revision, none of the month cues at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:149; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:199; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:283; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:329 names January or implies a month later than the December setting carried into chapter 17. A reader can move from this chapter into the provided chapter-17 opening without inferring a calendar jump.

findings.problem: The chapter's central fight too often arrives as polished thesis-speech rather than pressured human talk. Draco and Hermione repeatedly get clean mini-speeches that diagnose the exact thematic issue, rhetorical questions land on cue, and even the departure apology is shaped into a near-finished statement. The narrator's line-landing emphasis elsewhere in the scene reinforces the same over-written effect. In a scene this charged, the dominant register should be messier and more interrupt-driven than it is here.
findings.rewrite_direction: Loosen the confrontation at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:141; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:171; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:177; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:195; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:215; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:309, and trim narrator cueing around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:149 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:169. Keep the agency wound, her fear, and the decision to leave, but push more of that material through interruption, failed starts, silence, and local physical business at the table instead of paragraph-length diagnoses.
findings.acceptance_test: In the revised exchanges anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:141 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:223 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:299 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:310, neither speaker gets more than one extended clean thesis-speech without interruption, self-collapse, or redirection. At least one of Draco's agency accusations and one of Hermione's defenses must arrive through broken, character-true turns rather than complete thematic summaries, and the revised equivalents of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:149 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:169 must not tell the reader how a line landed or hit.

findings.problem: The chapter keeps returning to the same emphasis machinery: corrective negation beats of the form not this but that, plus fragment staccato used as pressure markers. Because the same scaffold shows up in discovery, confrontation, and aftermath, distinct emotional turns start sounding syntactically pre-solved rather than freshly perceived.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the sentence architecture at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:85; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:105; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:125; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:189; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:195; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:279; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:293; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:315; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:325; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:337. Replace several negation-correction or fragment beats with direct observation, action, or fully rendered declaratives, and reserve the template only for the moments when revised perception is itself the point.
findings.acceptance_test: In the revised prose around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:85 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:125 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:279 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:337, the chapter no longer stacks repeated not-this-but-that emphases or clipped fragment beats across consecutive key moments. At least three cited beats must be rewritten as direct description or action without that template, while the late aftermath still reads unmistakably as Draco's close third-person perception.

summary: FAIL. The chapter has real emotional force and a clear causal spine, but it breaks the cycle architecture in two consequential ways: it reveals the Manor's cannot-fabricate rule before the provided context says that reframe should arrive, and it dates the rupture to January against the continuity timeline and the next-chapter December boundary. On the page, the confrontation is also too often delivered as polished thematic speech, and the prose leans on repetitive negation/fragment scaffolds that flatten several major beats into the same syntactic rhythm.
